TERM SHEET - SERIES B FINANCING

Issuer: Beta Industries Pte. Ltd. (UEN 200998877K).
Lead Investor: Globex Ventures Pte. Ltd. (the "Lead Investor").
Round Size: $40 million.
Pre-Money Valuation: $160 million.
Investor stake: 20%.
Closing: Q3 2026, subject to definitive agreements and confidential due diligence.
Board Observer: Mr David Lee.
